brand_tone: Edgy, confident, non-corporate. 'Trade against real people. Not the broker.'

headings.usage: Use for all Hero H1s and section H2s. NEVER use Inter.

mono.usage: Used for all numbers, countdown timers, stats, and 'rules' key-values. Uppercase for labels.

layout_strategy.general: Bento grids, heavy asymmetry, generous spacing (p-12 to p-24 for sections). Containers with borders must have internal padding. Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing layouts, Shadcn for interactive pieces.
layout_strategy.surfaces: The 'Tracing Beam' for high-conversion CTAs. 'Retro-Futurism' (Terminal look) for data and stat readouts. No soft shadows. Use 1px sharp borders with neon glows on hover.

framer_motion_patterns.name: Staggered Bento Reveal
framer_motion_patterns.usage: Rules of Engagement section. Grid items fade up and in with a 0.1s stagger.

framer_motion_patterns.name: Equity Line Draw
framer_motion_patterns.usage: 1v1 Duel infographic. SVG path drawing animation over 2 seconds to simulate a live trade chart.

framer_motion_patterns.name: Kinetic Marquee
framer_motion_patterns.usage: Fast-moving outline text ('TRADE NOW. NO BROKER TRICKS.') behind the bottom CTA strip.

framer_motion_patterns.name: Elimination Drop
framer_motion_patterns.usage: Trading Royale timeline. Avatar icons scale down to 0 and turn gray as timeline progresses.

shared_components.name: StatPyramid
shared_components.description: A visual pyramid using Framer Motion to show prize distribution. Top tier is large and neon, bottom tiers are wider but muted.

shared_components.name: BracketViz
shared_components.description: Tournament bracket layout using SVG lines to connect match nodes. Active nodes glow lime.

shared_components.name: EliminationTimeline
shared_components.description: Horizontal timeline track. Uses a glowing 'current time' thumb. Previous nodes show eliminated status (red 'X' or grayed out).

shared_components.name: BentoRuleCard
shared_components.description: Grid tile for single rule (e.g., 'Account Size'). Features a massive Lucide icon at 20% opacity in background, bold Mono text in foreground.

shared_components.name: NeonBeamButton
shared_components.description: Primary CTA button with a rotating gradient border. Uses Lime background on hover.

1v1_duel.hero_treatment: 50/50 split layout. Left side tinted Lime, right side tinted Purple. 'Boxing ring spotlight' background texture. Two abstract trader avatars facing off.
1v1_duel.infographic_model: Equity Curve Clash. Recharts dual-line chart where one line crosses the other, ending in a massive glowing Lime dot.
1v1_duel.rules_layout: 2x2 Bento grid. 'Entry Fee' vs 'Account Size'. High contrast mono typography.
1v1_duel.prize_layout: Winner-takes-all layout. A single massive neon '100% Payout' badge with glowing particle effects around it.

trading_royale.hero_treatment: Dark grid background. Massive Mono countdown timer pulsing in red/lime. Text: 'Survive the Drop'.
trading_royale.infographic_model: EliminationTimeline. Horizontal scrolling track where trader nodes 'explode' or drop off as the timeline hits red zones.
trading_royale.rules_layout: Warning-label style bento grid. Yellow and black caution tape motifs as 1px borders.
trading_royale.prize_layout: TierLadder. Vertical stepped podium showing Top 10%, Top 5%, and Last Man Standing payouts.

multi_trader.hero_treatment: Kinetic marquee text background. Center-aligned heavy typography. Glowing podium graphic.
multi_trader.infographic_model: Live Shifting Bar Chart. Framer motion animated bars that swap positions to simulate a live leaderboard race.
multi_trader.rules_layout: 3-column list with large vertical numbers (01, 02, 03) anchoring each rule.
multi_trader.prize_layout: StatPyramid component. Top 3 get glowing colors, the rest get flat gray.

tag_team.hero_treatment: Node-based connecting lines background. Headline offset. Focus on 2v2 or 3v3 team dynamics.
tag_team.infographic_model: Node Connection Diagram. Two glowing avatars linked by a line representing total team equity vs another team.
tag_team.rules_layout: Split bento: 'Individual Rules' on left, 'Team Rules' on right.
tag_team.prize_layout: Split-pot graphic. Prize pool visually dividing into equal shares for team members.

community_battles.hero_treatment: Abstract dark texture background. 'Tug of war' progress bar dominating the hero.
community_battles.infographic_model: Stacked Area Chart (Recharts) showing two factions' total PnL pushing against each other.
community_battles.rules_layout: Grid-map style visual. Rules presented as 'territories' to conquer.
community_battles.prize_layout: Community Chest visual. An expanding circle chart showing how the pool grows with more participants.

affiliate.hero_treatment: Pure Lime accents. Abstract neon grid background. Headline: 'Your Network, Your Net Worth'.
affiliate.infographic_model: Infinite Loop / Branching Tree. SVG tree diagram showing one trader bringing in three, bringing in nine.
affiliate.rules_layout: Simple 3-step timeline. 1. Share 2. They Trade 3. You Earn.
affiliate.prize_layout: Compounding bar chart that grows exponentially, colored in bright Lime.

testing.rules: All interactive elements must retain the exact test-ids provided in the prompt. Use kebab-case.

image_urls.description: Dark grainy abstract texture. Use as overlay (opacity 10-20%) on Hero backgrounds to kill digital flatness.
Abstract purple neon grid. Use for Affiliate or Tag Team hero background.
Boxing ring spotlight. Use for 1v1 Duel Hero section behind the split screen.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural containers. Use Shadcn only for deep interactive elements if needed, but these are marketing pages so raw Tailwind bento grids are preferred.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Strictly use Clash Display or Cabinet Grotesk (fallback to a strong sans).
For rules and numeric stats, strictly use Space Mono or JetBrains Mono.
Do not use simple text paragraphs for 'The Model'. Implement the specific Framer Motion/Recharts diagrams defined in 'infographic_model' per page.
Bento grid items must have 1px borders (border-white/10) and internal padding (p-8).
Primary CTAs must use the brand Lime (#B4E04C) with high contrast text (black or dark bg).
Never center everything. Embrace asymmetry and strict grid alignment.
Ensure all data-testids are attached to the exact elements as requested.
